chunks.text: Welcome to EECS Women's History Month! - EECS at Berkeley Happy March and welcome to Berkeley EECS Women’s History Month (EECS WHM)! EECS WHM is a celebration held during Women’s History Month to recognize women, both past and present, in the fields of electrical engineering (EE) and computer science (CS). The goal of EECS WHM is to facilitate the conversation about diversity and inclusion in the field through a series of newsletter articles and events. This virtual year is no different, and we have created a unique repository of events and resources in an effort to foster a collaborative and supportive community virtually throughout March and beyond. This semester, we are hosting daily giveaways and social media challenges on our Discord server, and we encourage you all to join us in the celebration. Each week we have a different theme of resources and events for the Berkeley community to participate in: Week 1: Building a Community Week 2: Tech in the Industry Week 3: Academia and Beyond Week 4: Spring Break + Personal Projects Week 5: Achievements in Tech If you have any questions, please feel free to email our team or message us on Discord . We are excited to kick off the festivities! Discord Calendar Facebook Categories Current WHM Diversity Women's History View Open Faculty Positions
